the mean rental price for single family homes in miami is $3,200 with a median of $2,800 and a standard deviation of $500. there are no outliers in this dataset. the data shows that condos have a higher mean price than single family homes.  

the median rental price for condos in miami is $4,500 with a standard deviation of $700. there are no outliers in this dataset. the data shows that single family homes have a lower mean price than condos.  

the standard deviation for single family homes is $500, while for condos it is $700. the data shows that condos have a higher mean price than single family homes.
